# 機能要件

**Project**: TaskFlow - Project Management SaaS
**Mode**: Full
**Generated by**: requirements_designer

---

## FR-001: Task Creation and Management / タスク作成・管理

| Field                   | Value                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| ----------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **ID**                  | FR-001                                                                                                                                                                                |
| **Title**               | Task Creation and Management                                                                                                                                                          |
| **Description**         | Users can create, edit, and delete tasks with title, description, assignee, due date, and priority fields.                                                                            |
| **説明**                | ユーザーはタイトル、説明、担当者、期限、優先度フィールドを持つタスクを作成・編集・削除できる。                                                                                        |
| **Actor**               | Team Member                                                                                                                                                                           |
| **Priority**            | Must (MoSCoW)                                                                                                                                                                         |
| **Main Flow**           | 1. User clicks "New Task" button → 2. Fills in required fields (title, priority) → 3. Optionally adds description, assignee, due date → 4. Clicks "Save" → 5. Task appears in backlog |
| **Alternative Flow**    | 2a. User uses keyboard shortcut (Ctrl+N) to create task inline                                                                                                                        |
| **Exception Flow**      | 3a. If assignee is not a team member → show error "Selected user is not in this project"                                                                                              |
| **Acceptance Criteria** | Given a logged-in team member, When they create a task with title "Fix login bug" and priority "High", Then the task appears in the backlog with status "Todo"                        |
| **Source US**           | US-001                                                                                                                                                                                |
| **Non-Functional Link** | NFR-001 (Response time < 200ms for task creation)                                                                                                                                     |

---

## FR-002: Kanban Board View / カンバンボードビュー

| Field                   | Value                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| ----------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **ID**                  | FR-002                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| **Title**               | Kanban Board with Drag-and-Drop                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| **Description**         | The system provides a Kanban board view with customizable columns. Users can drag tasks between columns to update status.                                                                                                                |
| **説明**                | システムはカスタマイズ可能なカラムを持つカンバンボードビューを提供する。ユーザーはカラム間でタスクをドラッグしてステータスを更新できる。                                                                                                 |
| **Actor**               | Team Member                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| **Priority**            | Must (MoSCoW)                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| **Main Flow**           | 1. User navigates to Board view → 2. Board displays columns (Todo, In Progress, Review, Done) → 3. User drags task from "Todo" to "In Progress" → 4. Task status updates immediately → 5. Other team members see the change in real-time |
| **Alternative Flow**    | 3a. User right-clicks task and selects "Move to..." from context menu                                                                                                                                                                    |
| **Exception Flow**      | 4a. If network disconnected → queue status change and sync when reconnected                                                                                                                                                              |
| **Acceptance Criteria** | Given a task in "Todo" column, When a user drags it to "In Progress", Then the task status changes to "In Progress" and all connected users see the update within 1 second                                                               |
| **Source US**           | US-002                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| **Non-Functional Link** | NFR-002 (Real-time sync latency < 1s)                                                                                                                                                                                                    |

---

## FR-003: Sprint Planning / スプリント計画

| Field                   | Value                                                                                                                                                                          |
| ----------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| **ID**                  | FR-003                                                                                                                                                                         |
| **Title**               | Sprint Planning and Tracking                                                                                                                                                   |
| **Description**         | Users can create sprints with start/end dates, add tasks to sprints, and track sprint progress via burndown chart.                                                             |
| **説明**                | ユーザーは開始/終了日を持つスプリントを作成し、タスクをスプリントに追加し、バーンダウンチャートでスプリント進捗を追跡できる。                                                  |
| **Actor**               | Project Manager                                                                                                                                                                |
| **Priority**            | Must (MoSCoW)                                                                                                                                                                  |
| **Main Flow**           | 1. PM clicks "New Sprint" → 2. Sets sprint name, start date, end date → 3. Drags tasks from backlog into sprint → 4. Clicks "Start Sprint" → 5. Burndown chart begins tracking |
| **Alternative Flow**    | 3a. PM uses bulk select to add multiple tasks at once                                                                                                                          |
| **Exception Flow**      | 4a. If sprint dates overlap with existing sprint → show warning "Sprint dates overlap with [Sprint Name]"                                                                      |
| **Acceptance Criteria** | Given a PM creating a 2-week sprint with 10 tasks, When the sprint starts, Then a burndown chart displays showing ideal vs actual progress updated daily                       |
| **Source US**           | US-003                                                                                                                                                                         |
| **Non-Functional Link** | NFR-003 (Burndown chart renders < 500ms)                                                                                                                                       |

---

## FR-004: Team Member Management / チームメンバー管理

| Field                   | Value                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| ----------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| **ID**                  | FR-004                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| **Title**               | Team Member Invitation and Role Management                                                                                                                                                 |
| **Description**         | Project owners can invite team members via email, assign roles (Owner, Admin, Member, Viewer), and manage permissions.                                                                     |
| **説明**                | プロジェクトオーナーはメールでチームメンバーを招待し、役割（オーナー、管理者、メンバー、閲覧者）を割り当て、権限を管理できる。                                                             |
| **Actor**               | Project Owner                                                                                                                                                                              |
| **Priority**            | Must (MoSCoW)                                                                                                                                                                              |
| **Main Flow**           | 1. Owner navigates to Settings → Team → 2. Clicks "Invite Member" → 3. Enters email address and selects role → 4. System sends invitation email → 5. Invitee clicks link and joins project |
| **Alternative Flow**    | 3a. Owner enters multiple email addresses separated by commas for bulk invite                                                                                                              |
| **Exception Flow**      | 4a. If email address is already a member → show "This user is already a member of this project"                                                                                            |
| **Acceptance Criteria** | Given a project owner, When they invite user@example.com with "Member" role, Then the invitee receives an email within 30 seconds and can access the project after clicking the link       |
| **Source US**           | US-004                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| **Non-Functional Link** | NFR-004 (Email delivery < 30s)                                                                                                                                                             |

---

## FR-005: Real-time Notifications / リアルタイム通知

| Field                   | Value                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| ----------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| **ID**                  | FR-005                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| **Title**               | Real-time In-App Notifications                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| **Description**         | Users receive real-time notifications for task assignments, status changes, mentions, and sprint events. Notifications appear as a badge and in a notification panel.                                                                                              |
| **説明**                | ユーザーはタスク割り当て、ステータス変更、メンション、スプリントイベントのリアルタイム通知を受け取る。通知はバッジと通知パネルに表示される。                                                                                                                       |
| **Actor**               | Team Member                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| **Priority**            | Should (MoSCoW)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| **Main Flow**           | 1. Event occurs (e.g., task assigned to user) → 2. System generates notification → 3. Badge count increments on bell icon → 4. User clicks bell icon → 5. Notification panel shows unread notifications → 6. User clicks notification → navigates to relevant item |
| **Alternative Flow**    | 3a. If user has browser notifications enabled → show OS-level notification                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| **Exception Flow**      | 2a. If user has muted notifications for this project → skip notification                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| **Acceptance Criteria** | Given a user assigned to a task, When another user changes the task status, Then the assignee sees a notification badge within 2 seconds and can click to view the task                                                                                            |
| **Source US**           | US-005                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| **Non-Functional Link** | NFR-002 (Real-time sync latency < 1s)                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
